# Patti Smith Real Estate, El Dorado County, California

> El Dorado County real estate broker and relocation guide for the Sierra foothills. A resident broker serving the Georgetown Divide and the wider county, from the suburban valley edge to rural Gold Country, specializing in rural property, acreage, ranch and estate homes, wells and septic, fire zones, and matching buyers to the right foothill community.

## About
- Broker: Patti Smith (Patti Smith Real Estate, Independent; family-owned, own managing broker)
- License: CA DRE #01110483
- Office: 6180 State Highway 193, Georgetown, CA 95634
- Phone: (530) 368-0852
- Born and raised in El Dorado County; serving the Sierra foothills since 1992
- Board member, Marshall Medical Center; past president of the Georgetown Rotary Club

## El Dorado County at a glance
- County seat: Placerville; population about 191,000; area 1,786 square miles, from the valley edge near 1,600 feet to the high Sierra
- One county, many markets, layered by elevation: the suburban valley edge (El Dorado Hills, Cameron Park, Shingle Springs), the foothill towns (Placerville, Diamond Springs, Cool, Pilot Hill), the rural Divide (Garden Valley, Georgetown, Greenwood), and the mountains (Pollock Pines and up)
- Price spectrum roughly $200,000 to $2,000,000; about 60% of activity in the $400,000 to $700,000 range; the county-wide median is misleading because community medians vary widely
- Most rural property is on private wells and septic, with propane and sometimes private roads; most of the foothills falls within high fire hazard severity zones
- Served by many school districts rather than one, including Black Oak Mine Unified on the Divide and multiple districts around Placerville and toward El Dorado Hills

## Communities Patti serves (with dedicated guides)
- Georgetown (2,600 ft, historic ridge-top town): https://pattismithgeorgetowncalifornia.com/
- Garden Valley (1,949 ft, agrarian valley): https://pattismithgardenvalleycalifornia.com/
- Cool (1,532 ft, canyon-edge, Auburn Lake Trails): https://pattismithcoolcalifornia.com/
- Placerville (1,867 ft, county seat): https://pattismithplacervillecalifornia.com/
- Pilot Hill (1,175 ft, ranch country, Folsom Lake views): https://pattismithpilothillcalifornia.com/
